title: J2CL user opt-in preference
summary: Users can choose whether the default Wave experience opens the J2CL beta or the classic GWT client, while explicit view links remain reversible.

items: Added a Wave Client preference in Account Settings with Default, J2CL beta, and Classic GWT choices; the saved preference controls only default Wave routes and keeps ?view=j2cl-root and ?view=gwt available for direct switching.
